targets.rawSql:
IF DB_ID('distribution') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    SELECT 
        SERVERPROPERTY('MachineName') AS ServerName,
        SERVERPROPERTY('InstanceName') AS InstanceName,
        a.publication,
        a.publisher_db,
        a.subscriber_db,

        -- Latency in seconds since latest transaction entered distribution
        abs(DATEDIFF(SECOND, MAX(t.entry_time), GETDATE())) AS Latency,

        -- Undistributed commands pending for subscriber
        ISNULL(MAX(s.UndelivCmdsInDistDB),0) AS UndistributedCommands

    FROM distribution.dbo.MSrepl_transactions t with (nolock)
    JOIN distribution.dbo.MSdistribution_agents a with (nolock)
        ON t.publisher_database_id = a.publisher_database_id

    LEFT JOIN distribution.dbo.MSdistribution_status s
        ON a.id = s.agent_id

    GROUP BY
        a.publication,
        a.publisher_db,
        a.subscriber_db
END

SELECT publisher,
publisher_db,
publication_id,
CASE publication_type
	WHEN 0 then 'Transactional'
	WHEN 1 then 'Snapshot'
	WHEN 2 then 'Merge'
END AS publication_type_desc,
publication,
CASE agent_type
	WHEN 1 then 'Snapshot'
	WHEN 2 then 'Log Reader'
	WHEN 3 then 'Distribution'
	WHEN 4 then 'Merge'
	WHEN 9 then 'Queue Reader'
END AS agent_type,
agent_name,
CASE status
	WHEN 1 THEN 'Started'
	WHEN 2 THEN 'Succeeded'
	WHEN 3 THEN 'In progress'
	WHEN 4 THEN 'Idle'
	WHEN 5 THEN 'Retrying'
	WHEN 6 THEN 'Failed'
END AS agent_status,
CASE warning
	WHEN 1 THEN 'Expiration'
	WHEN 2 THEN 'Latency'
	WHEN 4 THEN 'Merge expiration '
	WHEN 16 THEN 'Merge slow run duration '
	WHEN 32 THEN 'Merge fast run speed '
	WHEN 64 THEN 'Merge slow run speed'
END AS warning
FROM distribution.dbo.MSreplication_monitordata
ORDER BY publisher, 
agent_type, 
publication

SELECT
    GETDATE() as sample_time,
    a.name as agent_name,
    h.runstatus,
    CASE h.runstatus
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Starting'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Succeeded'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'In progress'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Idle'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Retrying'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'Failed'
    END as status_desc,
    h.time,
    h.comments
FROM distribution.dbo.MSlogreader_agents a
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM distribution.dbo.MSlogreader_history h
    WHERE h.agent_id = a.id
    ORDER BY h.time DESC
) h;

SELECT
    GETDATE() as sample_time,
    a.name,
    a.publisher_db,
    a.subscriber_db,
CASE h.runstatus
        WHEN 1 THEN 'Starting'
        WHEN 2 THEN 'Succeeded'
        WHEN 3 THEN 'In progress'
        WHEN 4 THEN 'Idle'
        WHEN 5 THEN 'Retrying'
        WHEN 6 THEN 'Failed'
    END as status_desc,
    h.delivery_latency,
    h.delivered_commands,
    h.comments
FROM distribution.dbo.MSdistribution_agents a
OUTER APPLY (
    SELECT TOP 1 *
    FROM distribution.dbo.MSdistribution_history h
    WHERE h.agent_id = a.id
    ORDER BY h.time DESC
) h;

IF DB_ID('distribution') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
SELECT 'SnapShot' as [SnapShot]
,[comments],[start_time]
  FROM [distribution].[dbo].[MSsnapshot_history] 
  where
  comments in ('Starting agent.','Initializing') 
END

IF DB_ID('distribution') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
SELECT [runstatus]
      ,[start_time]
       ,[duration]
      ,[comments]
      ,[error_id]
  FROM [distribution].[dbo].[MSlogreader_history] where error_id<>0
  END

IF DB_ID('distribution') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
SELECT [start_time]
       ,[duration]
      ,[comments]
      ,[error_id]
  FROM [distribution].[dbo].[MSdistribution_history] where error_id<>0
  END

IF DB_ID('distribution') IS NOT NULL
BEGIN
    SELECT
    p.publisher_db,
    p.publication,
    a.article,
    a.source_owner AS schema_name,
    a.source_object,
    a.destination_owner,
    a.destination_object,
    a.article_id
FROM distribution.dbo.MSarticles a
JOIN distribution.dbo.MSpublications p
    ON a.publication_id = p.publication_id
ORDER BY
    p.publisher_db,
    p.publication,
    a.article;
END
